programmingStatus: Event programming to be announced. The listings shown are samples that demonstrate how special and recurring events will appear.

special.title: Corridor Walk & Building Stories
special.location: Lake Forest Blvd — meeting point TBD
special.description: A guided walk of the Crowder-to-Bullard corridor: which buildings are crossing the 50-year line, what the tax credit could do for each, and what the district plan proposes.

special.title: Property Owner Tax-Credit Briefing
special.description: A working session for corridor owners and long-term lessees: eligibility, the two-step approval path, and how the worked example translates to a real building.

special.title: District Day at Joe W. Brown Park
special.description: A family day at the district's green anchor — nature, water, and culture, all in one afternoon.

recurring.title: LFCD Board Working Session
recurring.description: Open working sessions on the resubmission strategy, asset assessment, and corridor outreach.

recurring.title: Nature Center Programs
recurring.description: Ongoing environmental education programming at the district's nature anchor.
